Why GLM Image?

The first open-source AI image generator with perfect text rendering

✦

Perfect Text

Generate images with accurate, readable text — unlike other AI generators that struggle with letters.

∞

Completely Free

No sign-up required. Generate images for free with generous daily limits.

◈

Open Source

Powered by GLM-Image, the open-source model that anyone can use and modify.

Frequently Asked Questions

Is GLM Image really free?

Yes! You can generate images for free with our daily limits. No credit card required.

What makes GLM-Image special?

GLM-Image is the first open-source model that can render accurate, readable text in images.

Can I use the images commercially?

Yes, you own the images you generate and can use them for personal or commercial purposes.

Do I need an API key?

No, we provide free generations. You can optionally use your own fal.ai API key for more credits.
